name: hw-codesign
description: For supported board families, turn an agent brief into a reviewable hardware candidate and an explicit fabrication-blocker report.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a supported-board brief into a candidate and fabrication blockers.
interface.longDescription: Create and iterate PCB electronics, mechanical parts, firmware interfaces, sourcing decisions, manufacturing candidates, and review bundles. Release promotion remains gated by explicit digital, native-tool, and physical evidence.
defaultPrompt: Create a hardware design candidate from my requirements.
Diagnose why this hardware project is blocked from release.
Review two candidates and prepare a fabrication review.
